feed.title: Oskar Austegard
feed.subtitle: Longer-form writing on AI, software, and building things.

entry.title: Claude Conversation Cache
entry.summary: A Chrome extension that intercepts Claude's API traffic and caches it locally, so when the UI crashes 90% through a response, you don't lose everything.

entry.title: What Can Claude Actually See? Mapping an AI's Visual Blindspots
entry.summary: 120+ controlled tests reveal where Claude's vision fails, where it matches humans, and where it diverges entirely. Then we built tools to compensate.

entry.title: Trust the Data, Not Your Imagination: Building an Image-to-SVG Skill
entry.summary: What happens when you pit a data-driven pipeline against 31 iterations of visual interpretation? A single automated pass matches the fidelity at half the file size.
